instruction: The library building icon has the wrong color and weight. Bring it back to the standard black outline style.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/building-library.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #3b82f6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 21v-8.25M15.75 21v-8.25M8.25 21v-8.25M3 9l9-6 9 6m-1.5 12V10.332A48.36 48.36 0 0 0 12 9.75c-2.551 0-5.056.2-7.5.582V21M3 21h18M12 6.75h.008v.008H12V6.75Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/building-library.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 21v-8.25M15.75 21v-8.25M8.25 21v-8.25M3 9l9-6 9 6m-1.5 12V10.332A48.36 48.36 0 0 0 12 9.75c-2.551 0-5.056.2-7.5.582V21M3 21h18M12 6.75h.008v.008H12V6.75Z"/></g>
</svg>
